commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a local smart-quote-aware fallback to embedded-agent-runner malformed tool-call argument repair and focused regression tests for top-level args, escapes, prose guards, and nested edit arrays.

PR surface: Source +406, Tests +190. Total +596 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked failure is source-reproducible because current main only has JSON.parse plus ASCII balanced-prefix repair, while the PR body and tests exercise smart-quoted streamed tool-call arguments through the actual wrapper.
